strategy: Team fight (20,220 health). Hit with Fire (she resists Ice and takes boosted Fire); use a Fire prism if you are an Ice wizard.
She forces random wizards to cast hanging effects (a weakness, a Spirit Blade, a Bomb DoT, or a HoT), then two rounds later hits them for 10% max health per forced effect still on them.
Clear the forced hanging effects before that willful-student hit lands: cleanse the weakness or blade, or triage the DoT or HoT.
Expect random interrupt Chain Lightnings, so keep resist up all fight.
Blade a single Fire hitter and burst between the forced-cast cycles.
cheatNotes: Flavor line she says at the start and after casting an empty blade, trap, aura, or global.
She randomly interrupts with a free Chain Lightning, so keep resist up.
The forced-cast cycle starts at the end of round 1 and repeats after it finishes.
She interrupts and forces a random wizard to cast one of the four hanging effects listed below.
Two rounds after forcing you, she hits for 10% max health per forced hanging effect still on you (an Ice hit for blades or weaknesses, a Storm hit for DoTs or HoTs). Clear those effects first.
